capabilities.name: URL redirects
capabilities.verify: page_redirects table + manage_redirect skill (list/create/update/delete, upsert by from_path, loop guard) + public resolve_redirect RPC consumed by PublicPage on 404 (chains, hit_count) (20260708090000). Admin Redirects tab on PagesListPage. LIVE VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-07 via MCP gateway: create ok, 2-hop chain resolved via anon RPC ({found:true,to_path:'/r8-final',hops:2}), loop rejected with explicit error.

capabilities.name: Multi-language pages
capabilities.verify: pages.locale + pages.translation_group_id + manage_page_translation skill (set_locale/link/unlink/create/list; create clones as draft) + public get_page_translations RPC; PublicPage resolves ?lang=<locale> to the published translation (20260708090000). LIVE VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-07: sv draft clone created ('r8-exp-control-sv'), list returned both locales, duplicate-locale create rejected.

capabilities.name: A/B testing
capabilities.verify: page_experiments + page_experiment_events + manage_page_experiment skill (create/start/stop/conclude/list/results) + public get_experiment_variant / record_experiment_conversion RPCs; PublicPage swaps in variant-B content (usePageExperiment, sticky server-side hash on pez_visitor_id) and FormBlock submits count as conversions; admin Experiments tab (20260708090000). LIVE VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-07: 8 visitors split 5a/3b deterministically (sticky re-check ok), variant content served, 2 conversions recorded on b, results returned rates (b 0.6667) and conclude stored winner.
